summary: S03 meets counting (8 subtopics, 8 demos, 24 exercises field-complete, 24 exam variants). Key Python demos/solutions for truthiness (T1-B) executed with outputs matching embedded expectations. match/case (T3-B) not runnable on host Python 3.9; if-equivalent of status_match verified. Seed data-structures 8×3=24 confirmed. Privacy OK. authorized_to_close_section=true.

checks.evidence: Theory subtopicId set is exactly S03-T1-A..S03-T4-B (8 unique).
iDo.steps with demoId: 8 (S03-T*-DEMO), environment browser-pyodide on each.
weDo.steps ids S03-T{1-4}-{A,B}-E{1-3} = 24; each has hints[≥2], starterCode, solutionCode, edgeCases, tests, feedback.
Executed S03-T1-B-DEMO: None/0/'' falsy; decide_monto None→review, 0→accept, -5→reject, 150→accept. Matches embedded output.
S03-T1-B-E1 solution: bool table 9 falsy + 3 truthy (incl. range(0) falsy, [0] truthy).
S03-T1-B-E2: '' or 'default'→default; Lima or→Lima; 0 and 99→0; 5 and 99→99; None or 0→0.
S03-T1-B-E3 validate_monto: None review; 0 accept; -1 reject; 100 accept.
S03-T2-B-DEMO validate_edad: None MISSING; '25' BAD_TYPE; -1/200 OUT_OF_RANGE; 15 NEEDS_REVIEW; 30 OK.
S03-T3-A-DEMO: Lima 30 accept; Tacna 30 review; Lima 15 reject; None 40 review.
S03-T3-B-E1 decision table dict: OK accept; MISSING review; OUT_OF_RANGE reject; FOO review.

Host python3 is 3.9.6 — match/case SyntaxError. Semantic equivalent status_if verified same outputs as embedded match solution (OK/MISSING/OUT_OF_RANGE/FOO/NEEDS_REVIEW). Course demos declare browser-pyodide (3.10+ match available to students).
validate_contacto: 999000111 accept; 12345 reject; None review; whitespace reject.
prisma/seed.ts data-structures: 8 concepts × 3 variants = 24. Slugs match s03_phase5_exam_bank / V3 S03 decisions.
24 MCQs × 4 options; correctIndex in 0–3; explanation present for all.

One item per concept: in allowlist; if monto falsy bug; if/elif exclusion; guard order None→tipo→rango; Tacna review; decision table def; examples canónicos; mensaje accionable. 8/8 match correctIndex=1.
youDo has title/context/objectives/requirements/rubric/starterCode; CP-N1-A referenced (7 mentions in section).
Synthetic only (999000111 demo phones, example regions). No real client PII.

notes_non_blocking: Host validator Python 3.9.6 cannot execute match/case; if-equivalent used. Student demos target browser-pyodide with match (3.10+).
selfCheck remains formative UI; full bank is 24 in seed.
